**Everything [Las Catalinas](https://www.lascatalinascr.com/)**  Jan 20, 2025

***All words with a 👉 blue underline  are hyperlinks \- click on them to see more details)***

**Here is what you will find in our town**:

* Las Catalinas is a 1,100 acre unique Mediterranean Style Beach Town that is an intricate, beautiful network of car-free streets, plazas, fountains and passageways that also offers many on-site amenities just steps away. We have a total of 142 houses and flats and 150 full-time residents from all over the world.

**Amenities Include:**

- Beautiful sandy & safe **Oceanfront** steps away for swimming, kayaking, snorkeling, stand-up paddleboarding etc...  (and many other beaches near by to explore)

- 42+ kilometers of professionally manicured [hiking](https://www.lascatalinascr.com/things-to-do/hiking-and-trail-running) & biking trails \- These trails traverse the waterfront up to some of the highest points in Las Catalinas with numerous lookout points and the chance to [encounter birds](https://thedaily.lascatalinascr.com/daily-october-10th-2019/?__hstc=121105111.b3d0a0276232cd7c19cb14ab8c10bf23.1579579617656.1580228112192.1580299989351.8&__hssc=121105111.1.1580299989351&__hsfp=1896734792) and [other wildlife](https://thedaily.lascatalinascr.com/daily-september-17th-2019/?__hstc=121105111.b3d0a0276232cd7c19cb14ab8c10bf23.1579579617656.1580228112192.1580299989351.8&__hssc=121105111.1.1580299989351&__hsfp=1896734792).

- Cafes, Restaurants, Shops & Grocery Stores

- Two hotels: [Santarena](https://www.santarenahotel.com/) & [Casa Chameleon](https://www.casachameleonhotels.com/las-catalinas/). Bed and Breakfast, [Posada San Rafael](https://www.beachtowntravel.com/es/hotels/posada-san-rafael)

- An extensive collection of houses available for vacation rentals via [Beach Town Travel](https://www.beachtowntravel.com/)

- The [Center of Joy](https://centerofjoy.com/)

- [The Beach Club](https://www.lascatalinascr.com/things-to-do/beach-club) \- BRAND NEW RENOVATION \- NEW OWNERSHIP as of 2024\.   
  \* ADULT Daily Pass is $30 USD \+ 13% VAT \- However, **if you spend $15 in food or drinks then it’s only $15/day.**   
  **\*** CHILD Daily Pass  (8-12 yr) $15 USD \+ 13% VAT . **If you spend $10 in food or drink for them then it’s only $5/day.**  
  * **25-meter lap pool** with four swim lanes  
  * **Adult lounging pool**   
  * **Hot Spa Jacuzzi plunge pool**   
  * Comfortable **lounge chairs with towel service**  
  * **Kids’ play pool**  
  * Dining at the **Beach Club restaurant**  
  * **Cocktail bar**   
  * **Exercise room** with weightlifting and cardio equipment

- 11 **Restaurants**: [Ponciana](https://www.lascatalinascr.com/shopping-and-dining/ponciana) at Santarena Hotel, [Celeste](https://www.lascatalinascr.com/shopping-and-dining/celeste)  (Newly opened \- I haven’t tried but I hear it’s wonderful but expensive)  [La Taqueria](https://www.lascatalinascr.com/shopping-and-dining/the-beach-club) at The Beach Club, [Sentido Norte](https://www.sentidonorterestaurant.com/) at Casa Chameleon, [Pots & Bowls](https://www.lascatalinascr.com/shopping-and-dining/pots--bowls-food-truck), [Pots & Bowls](https://www.facebook.com/potsandbowlsatlascatalinas), [Cuatro Calle la Ronda](https://www.lascatalinascr.com/shopping-and-dining/cuatro-calle-la-ronda), [The Deli at Copper and Stone](http://www.copperandstonegourmet.com/), [Pascual Tapas Bar](http://pascualcr.com/)  Nature’s Table (Health conscious café nestled within the heart of Center of Joy \- right in front of our building)  
  Papagayo Taphouse by [Papagayo Brewing Co.](https://papagayo-brewing.com/) and [Coquelicot](https://www.instagram.com/coquelicot_cr/) – Ice cream and waffles 

- Retailers: [Pura Vida Ride](https://www.puravidaride.com/), [Copper and Stone](http://www.copperandstonegourmet.com/), [Las Catalinas Collection](https://www.lascatalinascr.com/shopping-and-dining/las-catalinas-collection), [Wake Day Spa](https://www.wakedayspa.com/), [CORE by Chak Fitness](https://chak.fitness/), [d-Aqui Design Studio](http://d-aquidesign.com/), [Chunches](https://www.chunchesconsignment.com/), [ConnectOcean](https://www.lascatalinascr.com/shopping-and-dining/connectocean), [Elif Academy](https://www.instagram.com/elifacademy__/?hl=en)

- **“The Prado”** \- Currently Growing our New Next Phase (30 acres) across the street called with amenities such as:

  * **Main** **Street** – the public road through Las Catalinas, currently a bit of a sore-thumb for us, will be re-done as a beautiful traditional main street, with proper on-street parking, shady street trees, and sidewalks.  We await only permission to make the changes.  We can’t wait\!  
  * **Parque** **Central** – Las Catalinas will soon have a proper central park with a park, playing fields, shady trees, 4 tennis courts, a pool, basketball courts and elegant walking paths.  
  * **A** **commercial core** with office and retail space and long-term housing.  
  * **A new network of intricate and beautiful streets, passages**, **plazas, fountains, funiculars and** **beautiful stair streets\!** – providing a great variety of living options and ocean views.  
    

**For Medical Emergencies 🏥** Ask the concierge for help. 

Closest clinic is in **Huacas-[Beachside Clinic](https://beachsidecliniccr.com/)** DR. OSCAR SALAS \+506 2653-9911. 

There is also a hospital in [Flamingo](https://www.facebook.com/HospitalDeLiberia/)**. Dr Enrique Baltodano Briceño \+506-2690 2300**

**🛬 Airport: Closest airport is Liberia (LIR)**  It’s a 1hr drive to LC. (45 minutes if monkey trail is open/passable considering rain collection). (the other airport San Jose is 4 hour drive to LC)

**Packing List & Tips ([here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/10dnsVSWYcG-el-e6TqleyHp_HU1HVAFzGv6CknOH0Eo/edit?usp=sharing))** 

**🚙DRIVERS** \- are also readily available with advance reservations \- **Have cash to pay.**

* **Las Catalinas Concierge**  concierge@lascatalinascr.com  

(Luxury vehicle – Approximately $160 one way for up to 4 people)

* [**\*Javier Vargas**](https://www.tripadvisor.com/ShowUserReviews-g309244-d3840128-r808923257-Costa_Rica_EZ_Travel_Adventures-Playa_Flamingo_Province_of_Guanacaste.html) ❤🇨🇷🤠-+506-8837-1531. A 5 star Rockstar Tour Guide & Driver \- He’s amazing, his excursions are fabulous [LovingCostaRica.com](http://LovingCostaRica.com) (Airport transportation is $100)

* Kike Transports \+506-8981-6161 (Referred by Javier)

**🚕 Uber \- has recently been introduced to Costa Rica** 

* **Alex** Moreno \+506 8384 8222 \- His rates vary but LC to Potrero or flamingo is \~ 30-40$ 

* **Walter** Taxi for the Potero area  \+506 8305 0470

**☀️ 🛩️ 🌴\_  \_🛒\_🚗\_\_🚕\_ 🛒\_ 🌴**

 **Grocery Stores → on the way to Las Catalinas** 

**Grocery List \- [Here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1T9k7dfEtkDV1rjXMy0Hgnb3UDfV7M36ZpGaGrGxp6jY/edit?usp=sharing)**

[Walmart](https://www.weeklycrawler.com/local-news/walmart-liberia-costa-rica-review-prices-and-hours/) \- 10 minutes from the airport \- Large, clean with a great selection of items. Usually 10-15% off regular grocery stores. Food, Ice, Beach chairs, electronics, household items.

[**Pricemart**](https://www.pricesmart.com/site/jm/en/club-locations/club/liberia)  \- 3 min away from the airport. Like Costco ($35 annual fee). If you’re staying for a long period, this is worth it. Left out of the airport, toward Liberia; There are markets along the way.

[**Discount Italian Store**](https://discostarica.com/) 160, Guanacaste Province, Nosara. (In the same shopping center with the ‘Do It Center’ on Hwy 21 on the right side of the road. Closed on Mondays. Hours 8-6).

Offer great charcuterie (Italian meats & cheeses), cookies, pastas, and great wine selection. Impressive pasta selection including frozen entrees (Bolognese, frozen meat pockets, and lasagna) that are delicious. 

Wines we've tried that are super affordable include: 

* Montepulciano D’bruzzo ¢4500/each ($7.14) or box of 6 \= ¢23970 ($38.04...$6.34 each)  
* Pinot Grigio Vitis Nostra  ¢4900/each ($7.78) or box of 6 \= ¢23970 ($47.13...$6.74 each)

**🍽️ Restaurants near the LIR airport** 

[El Callejero](https://maps.app.goo.gl/zRg19U4WAjcCerbD9?g_st=ic) \- many options from healthy bowls to bbq ribs. Vibe relaxing and welcoming


**🍽️ Restaurants @ Las Catalinas**

* [**Celeste**](https://www.instagram.com/celeste_restaurant_/)\- NEW Jan 2024 Outdoor-indoor dining & cocktails by the sea  
  Reservations \+506 2654 4600, EXT. 4051 or celeste.restaurant@lascatalinascr.com.

* [**Pots & Bowls**](http://www.potsandbowlscr.com/menu/english/)  **Must go** *(Link to Eng Menu) [Insta](https://www.instagram.com/potsandbowls/)*

* [**Pascual**](https://www.pascualcr.com/#comida) *\+506 6440 3850 (Tapas) 2pm \-10pm*

* [**Papagayo brewing co**](https://papagayo-brewing.com/) *\- A brewhouse beachside bar & casual bits with swings seats & large TV’s for sports games.*

* **Coquelicot** * \- **Kids must go 😆\!** Ice cream and belgium waffles food truck ([Menu](http://connectoceancr.com/coquelicot/) & [Insta](https://www.instagram.com/coquelicot_cr/))*

* *The Deli @*[**Copper & Stone**](http://copperandstonegourmet.com/)**.** Signature Sandwiches, Prepared Meals, organic smoothies & coffees, salads. Pricey, but excellent & convenient. Great fresh breads/pastries. Each day of the week, they offer a vegetarian and a non-vegetarian entrée. Pizza special every Friday. 

* ***Beach*** **Club Restaurant (Under renovation  \- Just light snacks)** 

* [***Pura*** **Vida Ride**](https://www.puravidaride.com/#about)**\- Must go \- Get up and head there in the morning \- sit in the rocking chairs and listen to the ocean \-** amazing coffee, great *empanadas &* muffins in the morning and gelato.


* ***Santarena*** **Hotel** restaurants   
  *  **Ponciana**  **Must Go \!** Hotel’s signature restaurant & bar \- Breakfast \- (Great Breakfast buffet too) Lunch or Dinner.  Excellent Quality. [**Eng Menu**](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1qDgKvDnRrrl3lbsHO26kIT3XtoUBO_3S/view?usp=sharing) & **[Reviews](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g6437168-d16779914-Reviews-Ponciana-Las_Catalinas_Province_of_Guanacaste.html)** (Make reservations \-506 2654-4600 x 1062\) Indoor & Outdoor seating \- Italian Mediterranean (sourced locally). Social & cultural space where people gather to eat, drink, and socialize. Enjoy breakfast, lunch, and dinner in the restaurant or cocktails at the bar. (Happy Hr in Jan BOGO..check if this is still happening)

  * [**Cuatro Calle la Ronda**](https://www.santarenahotel.com/dining/4-calle-la-ronda) \- LOVE the Breakfast Burrito \-amazing) a small cafe that is part of the hotel \- Coffees \- Smoothies \- breakfast, lunch, and snacks on the go. It’s a welcoming and friendly space providing a cozy atmosphere with an outdoor terrace.

**🛒Grocery @ Las Catalinas** 

* [**Copper & Stone**](http://copperandstonegourmet.com/)**.** Amazing Fresh Groceries onsite. 

**Fitness @ Las Catalinas**

[**Chak Fitness/Core Gym**](https://chak.fitness/%20)  **\-** Outdoor workouts \- Pay by the class or buy a week pass. Amazing, onsite, overlooking the beach. Weights made of stones and wood. Chak is owner/trainer. Classes/workout daily at 9am for a fee.

[**Yoga at Casa Chameleon**](https://www.casachameleonhotels.com/mal-pais/wellness/) \+506 2103 1200 (M-Thurs @9am). $14-best view anywhere (Call to confirm times**)** 

**Beach Club Pool & Gym**\- ($50/guest pass)

[**Experiences at Las Catalinas**](https://www.lascatalinascr.com/experiences) (👈Click to see LC website of activities: Group Exercise Classes, Massage, [**E-Foiling & Jet Boarding**](https://www.puravidaride.com/blog-posts/e-foilingandjetboarding), Pickleball, Basketball, Horseback, fresh eggs from the chickens,..) 

**Hiking @ Las Catalinas** \- BRING WATER\!   
The trails are well maintained & offer  incredible views. 

\*The concierge can provide a map. Grab a trail map AND download the AllTrails App. The AllTrails app works very well in LC. It’ll give you a good idea of the intensity/distance of the hike. Before heading out, make sure you bring a LOT of water, especially in the dry season. Spray insect repellent on your legs.  Hiking shoes or trail running shoes are a good idea.

**Massage @ Las Catalina’s \-** Wake spa \+506-4020-1080 (expensive but excellent & convenient) 

**Nearby Massage** on Playa Potrero beach with Ask for Veronica\!\! She has 2 side by side tables, all covered, with privacy,  overlooking the ocean. (She can also come to LC)   
Price as of 2025: 1 hr for $50 or 90 min for $100 which includes $10 tip  \+506 6108-3491

**In House Chef’s** 

- **Copper and Stone** \- Best Prices and Fabulous Food. They can prepare a simple BBQ or extravagant meal. Contact Event Manager, Anna K \+506 8334 8766  
    
- **Sushi \- Diego Santanrena** \- \+506 8942-1717. Food is amazing\! He will come to your house and prepare anything. About $50/pp (+ tip) for an amazing meal and experience\! He provides EVERYTHING \- dishes \- set up \- cleaning \- everything.  
  - He also owns two popular food trucks in Huacas (\~18 min away) [OrigamiStreet Food.CR](http://Food.CR) and [Kotoy Food Truck](https://www.facebook.com/kotoy.foodtruck?mibextid=LQQJ4d)

- [**RLT Cuisine**](https://www.rltcuisine.com/) **\- AMAZING [Cooking Classes & Private Dinners](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Road+Less+Traveled+Cuisine/@10.4590195,-85.7674299,3a,75y,90t/data=!3m8!1e2!3m6!1sAF1QipOcRwo9f9yhRYkfAPWvGu_lF70kSwuXmDNghDjf!2e10!3e12!6shttps:%2F%2Flh5.googleusercontent.com%2Fp%2FAF1QipOcRwo9f9yhRYkfAPWvGu_lF70kSwuXmDNghDjf%3Dw203-h152-k-no!7i4032!8i3024!4m9!3m8!1s0x8f9e255f9d5c08b5:0x30cbeb59fd7bd9c7!8m2!3d10.4590195!4d-85.7674299!10e5!14m1!1BCgIgARICEAM!16s%2Fg%2F11swycn6vf?entry=ttu) \-** I linked photos from my trip there (Gilberto Briceno Chef is a culinary MASTER\! (His cooking classes are in Portero 10 min away)

**Portero \- downtown** (the town right next to us- \<10 min)

**Hair cuts, Mani/Pedi’s** \- In the heart of Portero   
(Men & Women here go faithfully to both haircut places \- they do great work \+ very affordable\!   
[Nenúfar Beauty Salon](https://www.google.com/maps/dir/Guanacaste+Province,+Las+Catalinas,+Costa+Rica/Nen%C3%BAfar+Beauty+salon+and+Barber+Shop,+Guanacaste+Province,+Potrero,+Costa+Rica/@10.4703238,-85.7875143,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m14!4m13!1m5!1m1!1s0x8f9e25ee7d7275cb:0x66fef976ab80fbe9!2m2!1d-85.786591!2d10.4814356!1m5!1m1!1s0x8f9e25778dfb1cfd:0xff1b88824da85348!2m2!1d-85.7709281!2d10.458905!3e0) in Portero \- 10 min from LC (Men’s cuts $8 UDS \- Eric & Kyle go every time)

(\*There is another traditional men’s barber shop right across the street from Nenufar that the guys here absolutely love \- they told me they have gone to him for the past 10 years\! I need the [link](https://theblog.lascatalinascr.com/happenings-in-playa-potrero-and-beyond))

**\*Car Wash** “E\&M” is right next door \- in a side yard \- but great service \- will do interior & exterior for $5-8,000 colones \- Make an Appt Whatsapp 506-7010-7800 or [lavacareym22@gmail.com](mailto:lavacareym22@gmail.com) They speak NO English. Go to [**La Jama**](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100063818880971) restaurant right next door while you wait \- super casual but excellent) 

**Portero \- Slightly Removed from Downtown's Core, Yet Only Minutes Away**

They call this area the “Italian Village Shops**”** the address is **“Villaggio Flor de Pacifico”**

- [**Aphrodite** Hair Salon](http://www.tonycarboni.it/) ✂️Tony \+506 6124 3379 \- this is also in Portero but just past the main area \- it’s called the italian village \- address is  “villaggio \#3 Piazzetta San Marco, Potrero” 

- [**Marcosta Seafood Market**](https://www.facebook.com/marcostaseafood) **\- amazing \- fresh fish caught daily**

- **El Patio Bakery  (Patio Panadería \- GREAT Bakery\!\!)**

- **Pizza/Italian-  [Central Square](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g1380092-d19955371-Reviews-Central_Square_CR-Playa_Potrero_Province_of_Guanacaste.html) Restaurante**

- [**RLT Cuisine**](https://www.rltcuisine.com/) **\- AMAZING [Cooking Classes & Private Dinners](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Road+Less+Traveled+Cuisine/@10.4590195,-85.7674299,3a,75y,90t/data=!3m8!1e2!3m6!1sAF1QipOcRwo9f9yhRYkfAPWvGu_lF70kSwuXmDNghDjf!2e10!3e12!6shttps:%2F%2Flh5.googleusercontent.com%2Fp%2FAF1QipOcRwo9f9yhRYkfAPWvGu_lF70kSwuXmDNghDjf%3Dw203-h152-k-no!7i4032!8i3024!4m9!3m8!1s0x8f9e255f9d5c08b5:0x30cbeb59fd7bd9c7!8m2!3d10.4590195!4d-85.7674299!10e5!14m1!1BCgIgARICEAM!16s%2Fg%2F11swycn6vf?entry=ttu) \-** Linked photos from my trip. Gilberto Briceno Chef is a culinary MASTER\! 

**🛒 🚗Grocery \- Outside of Las Catalinas**

* **La Muralla \- on the way to Potrero [Address](https://www.google.com/search?rlz=1C5GCCM_en&sca_esv=15988f96c695c280&cs=0&q=super+la+muralla+antiguo+super+wendy+address&ludocid=17681866345427873284&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwj-55jK_oSLAxU0TTABHVflMY0Q6BN6BAgSEAI) :** C6XJ+9F9, Brasilito to Potrero, Guanacaste Province, Santa Cruz   [**Hours**](https://www.google.com/search?rlz=1C5GCCM_en&sca_esv=15988f96c695c280&cs=0&q=super+la+muralla+\(antiguo+super+wendy\)+hours&ludocid=17681866345427873284&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwj-55jK_oSLAxU0TTABHVflMY0Q6BN6BAgQEAI): 2 \-10 PM    [**Phone**](https://www.google.com/search?rlz=1C5GCCM_en&sca_esv=15988f96c695c280&cs=0&q=super+la+muralla+antiguo+super+wendy+phone&ludocid=17681866345427873284&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwj-55jK_oSLAxU0TTABHVflMY0Q6BN6BAgYEAI) **:** [2654 4372](https://www.google.com/search?sca_esv=15988f96c695c280&rlz=1C5GCCM_en&q=la+muralla+potrero&source=lnms&fbs=AEQNm0Aa4sjWe7Rqy32pFwRj0UkWd8nbOJfsBGGB5IQQO6L3J5m2RNdZ7TqBBDB_EAGU4N1KmHmEYoxnGi716uJtDrT4_3gmWI3BKKKQPiuR7ox4vjOE7kVMMM-n09yVdYC6Ap081pxO6Tog5XposKo2eo0eoP5dp5UihzRuC4wOb0VlY41Z82s&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwih-YDF_oSLAxVIVTABHS8PLdgQ0pQJegQIExAB&biw=843&bih=626&dpr=2&lqi=ChJsYSBtdXJhbGxhIHBvdHJlcm9InKiPsuyAgIAIWiQQABABEAIYABgBGAIiEmxhIG11cmFsbGEgcG90cmVybzICZXOSAQ1ncm9jZXJ5X3N0b3JlqgFTEAEqFiISbGEgbXVyYWxsYSBwb3RyZXJvKA4yHxABIht4LTn1OudFYK5v5v4-7NUY28GAt4FD6r1hRIEyFhACIhJsYSBtdXJhbGxhIHBvdHJlcm8#)

* [**MerKdo**](https://www.facebook.com/MerKdo.Supermarket) \- 10-12 min \- Small with basic items. Centro Comercial Pacifico **Playa Potrero** 

* [**Super Massai**](https://www.google.com/maps/dir/Guanacaste+Province,+Las+Catalinas,+Costa+Rica/Super+Massai+Grocery,+Brasilito+to+Potrero,+Guanacaste+Province,+Playa+Flamingo,+Costa+Rica/@10.4574731,-85.7950277,14z/am=t/data=!3m1!4b1!4m14!4m13!1m5!1m1!1s0x8f9e25ee7d7275cb:0x66fef976ab80fbe9!2m2!1d-85.786591!2d10.4814356!1m5!1m1!1s0x8f9e25421a2ba8fd:0xc0917d9148054f72!2m2!1d-85.782068!2d10.4331484!3e0) —\> 15-18 min \- Wide selection, fresh fruit & veggies & sell American products (main road Route 180\)

* **Auto Mercado**; the “most American” store \- located by **Coco Beach** (about 45 min drive [Google Map](https://www.google.com/maps/dir/Guanacaste+Province,+Las+Catalinas,+Costa+Rica/Auto+Mercado,+El+Coco,+Sardinal,+Carrillo,+Guanacaste+Province,+Coco,+Costa+Rica/@10.502792,-85.7907778,12z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m14!4m13!1m5!1m1!1s0x8f9e25ee7d7275cb:0x66fef976ab80fbe9!2m2!1d-85.786591!2d10.4814356!1m5!1m1!1s0x8f9e2982990c9677:0x7e45694475b3246e!2m2!1d-85.6933679!2d10.5460334!3e0)) and another location in Tamarindo (about 55 min drive [Google Map](https://www.google.com/maps/dir/Guanacaste+Province,+Las+Catalinas,+Costa+Rica/Auto+Mercado+Tamarindo,+Guanacaste+Province,+Santa+Cruz,+Costa+Rica/@10.3945104,-85.8453994,12z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m14!4m13!1m5!1m1!1s0x8f9e25ee7d7275cb:0x66fef976ab80fbe9!2m2!1d-85.786591!2d10.4814356!1m5!1m1!1s0x8f9e394300b10eaf:0x2c7b541ab4a3ce62!2m2!1d-85.8309677!2d10.3088659!3e0))

**👩🏻‍🍳 Restaurants \- nearby** 

**Potrero \-** town next to Las Catalinas

* [**La Forketta**](https://qrco.de/bbsW03) – Cozy Italian eatery w/ incredible pastas & brick-oven pizzas, super friendly staff. The seating is mostly outdoors & the restaurant is quite popular so make sure make reservations on WhatsApp  506 8437-5974. Gabby is our fave waitress; she may even bring limoncello shots at end of meal ([Trip Advisor](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g1380092-d14935942-Reviews-La_Forketta-Playa_Potrero_Province_of_Guanacaste.html))

* [**Las** **Brisas**](https://playapotrero.cr/business/costa-rica/provincia-guanacaste/playa-potrero/las-brisas-restaurant/) – great dive bar atmosphere overlooking the bay.  Relatively cheap beer & wine. Probably better for drinking than eating, but a pretty good bar food type menu. Tuna tower rocks. Las Brisas, Calle Potrero, Puerto Potrero, Provincia Guanacaste Playa Potrero \+506 2654 4047

* **Carpe** **Diem** (Closed) in Playa Potrero. New Mexican restaurant just opened there

* [Soda Maria Theresa](https://www.facebook.com/sodamariateresa/), and Sol y Mar &  [**La Pizzetteria**](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g1380092-d15089933-Reviews-La_Pizzetteria-Playa_Potrero_Province_of_Guanacaste.html). They’re “fine” but nothing special

* [**The Beach House**](https://www.beachhousecr.com/) – ([Trip advisor](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g1380092-d4747976-Reviews-The_Beach_House_Restaurant_and_Bar-Playa_Potrero_Province_of_Guanacaste.html)) restaurant/bar located on Playa Potrero overlooking the “marina”. Good seafood & American fare. Amazing Tuna Poke Bowl. See full [menu](http://www.beachhousecr.com). Limited parking in the front of the restaurant. Ok to park along the side of the road opposite the restaurant. (Will cook fish you catch)

* **Estero Azul** – a little hard to find, but very local feel. Good food but limited bar, is on the water and we truly enjoyed chilling there. Covered/all outdoors ([TripAdvisor](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g309244-d2217801-Reviews-Soda_Y_Restaurante_El_Estero_Azul-Playa_Flamingo_Province_of_Guanacaste.html)) 

* **Italian Ice Cream/ Gelato Shop called [‘Heladeria 0039’](https://www.google.com/maps/uv?pb=!1s0x8f9e258064cba879%3A0x66600efa1c18fd44!3m1!7e115!4shttps%3A%2F%2Flh5.googleusercontent.com%2Fp%2FAF1QipN_O3XVOEWoJd3CVS7N3ZqK72LXGB9Jx4tvtHW7%3Dw572-h385-n-k-no!5sheladeria%200039%20-%20Google%20Search!15sCgIgAQ&imagekey=!1e10!2sAF1QipN_O3XVOEWoJd3CVS7N3ZqK72LXGB9Jx4tvtHW7&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiSyLXW-9H8AhX2SzABHSa0BZIQ7ZgBKAB6BAgbEAI)** \- Great & affordable\! Take away extra\!

* [**La Jama**](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100063818880971) **\-** Outdoor super casual place- Live music (sometimes they have Karaoke). Breakfast, Lunch or Dinner  (next door to E\&M car wash & [Nenúfar Beauty Salon](https://www.google.com/maps/dir/Guanacaste+Province,+Las+Catalinas,+Costa+Rica/Nen%C3%BAfar+Beauty+salon+and+Barber+Shop,+Guanacaste+Province,+Potrero,+Costa+Rica/@10.4703238,-85.7875143,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m14!4m13!1m5!1m1!1s0x8f9e25ee7d7275cb:0x66fef976ab80fbe9!2m2!1d-85.786591!2d10.4814356!1m5!1m1!1s0x8f9e25778dfb1cfd:0xff1b88824da85348!2m2!1d-85.7709281!2d10.458905!3e0) (all are great)

**Surf Side \- just past Potrero**

* [**NASU RESTAURANT**](https://www.bahiadelsolhotel.com/restaurant/) \- Next to the [**Sailing Center**](https://ticotimes.net/travel/costa-rica-sailing-center-potrero-may-worlds-chillest-yacht-club) \- Inside the Hotel Bahia del Sol. Outdoor Restaurant (Covered & uncovered ) loverlooks Ocea. Specializes in seafood & internatl cuisine.

* [**Hemingway's**](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g1380092-d19611372-Reviews-Hemingway_s-Playa_Potrero_Province_of_Guanacaste.html) **\-must go \- Next door to Hotel Bahia del Sol**.Beachside, direct sunset view, sand, Bar, pool, good casual vibe. Sailing club attached. .Gerald's drinks won overall. The signature cocktails eclipsed the food, and not just because there was a good amount of booze in em, lol. Tuna poke was awesome, as were chips and guacamole. Beautiful view and good friendly service

* [**Cafe Del Sol Lounge & Rooftop**](https://www.cafedelsolcr.com/) \- a new place, which as 4 separate eating options: a Bakery, a Restaurant, a Lounge & a Rooftop bar 

* [**Aji Mahi**](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g1380092-d21312050-Reviews-Aji_Mahi_Peruvian_Restaurant-Playa_Potrero_Province_of_Guanacaste.html) \- Peruvian Restaurant 

* [**Potrero Brewing Co**](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g1380092-d12140083-Reviews-Potrero_Brewing_Company-Playa_Potrero_Province_of_Guanacaste.html)

* **NEW [Marina Flamingo](https://www.visitmarinaflamingo.com/activities/) \- Brand New** ([Google map](https://maps.app.goo.gl/EUtnuFdPnMybVxfz7)) \- this is a fun easy ½  outing-\- 15 min away  \- free parking in their new parking garage for 2 hrs then $2/hr after. **“**The crown jewel of Playa Flamingo, besides the beautiful Marina with all the sailboats, it’s also a vibrant walkable community with restaurants, and retail stores right on the waterfront.”

[Marina Flamingo Restaurants](https://www.visitmarinaflamingo.com/activities/)   
[Shops](https://www.visitmarinaflamingo.com/activities/)  
[Services](https://www.visitmarinaflamingo.com/activities/) (Medical Clinic, Farmacia, BCT Bank/ATM)  
[Sailing Trips](https://www.visitmarinaflamingo.com/activities/)  
[Fishing Charters](https://www.visitmarinaflamingo.com/activities/)

**Flamingo/Brasilito:** Rent **Golf Carts** 🛺 [Here](http://flamingobeachgolfcarts.com/product/golf-cart-rental)

* [**Surf** **Box**](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g309244-d8869786-Reviews-Surf_Box-Playa_Flamingo_Province_of_Guanacaste.html) –must do  *Just moved to Flamingo Marina\!* Great spot for breakfast & lunch. Food is delicious w/some healthy options. Our favorites include Avocado toast & Medianoche (their version of a Cuban Sandwich.)  See FaceBook page for complete menu. Limited covered seating/all outdoors

* [**a'lo Nico**](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g309244-d9763870-Reviews-A_lo_Nico-Playa_Flamingo_Province_of_Guanacaste.html) **\-** a great place to eat local…this is your place. The Casado is out of this world. Also, the lemonade is delish\!\!\! . The chicken shawarma was so flavorful, the Casados were amazing, and the Caribbean and blackberry smoothies were so refreshing\! We couldn’t leave without trying the crepes, and neither should you ☺️ **C6G8+WF5, Provincia de Guanacaste, Playa Flamingo, Costa Rica**

* [**Coco Loco**](https://www.airbnb.com/things-to-do/places/146922) –Casual restaurant on the beach in the heart of Flamingo bay.  It feels a bit touristy, but worth the trip. Good food & drinks. Park your car on the side of the road near the restaurant and pay “the man” a few dollars to watch over your car.  See menu on their Facebook page. The Coco Loco drink is a treat sipped from a coconut. 

* [**Patagonia** **Del Mar**](https://patagoniadelmar.business.site/) \- Nice restaurant with excellent menú of seafood, steaks, appetizers & nice selection of wines and cocktails.  *Lisa’s fave Tuna Poke* anywhere as of yet. Their sushi is excellent. They also have a happy hour and a pool. Covered/all outdoor eating.  Good idea to make reservations  \- WhatsApp 506-8800-0005. 

* [**Gracia at Mar Vista**](https://graciacostarica.com/mar-vista/) – Up on a hilltop with stunning Ocean Views. Day to night restaurant with infinity pool and swim up bar makes a great day for the whole family. It’s in the Mar Vista “subdivision” \- a gated community, just tell the guard “Vamos a Gracia”. Get there early, enjoy the sunset (in or out of the pool), bring a towel & change of clothes/rinse off, stay for dinner. Excellent menu of nice entrees and a killer key lime pie for dessert. Great for a large group [www.graciamarvista.com](http://www.graciamarvista.com) .  Reservations recommended via WhatsApp 506 6110 1687

* **Amigos Tacos y Beer \-** Best Tacos in Playa Flamingo [Next to Super Massai Flamingo, Playa Flamingo 50308 Costa Rica](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g309244-d17416431-Reviews-Amigos_Tacos_y_Beer-Playa_Flamingo_Province_of_Guanacaste.html#MAPVIEW)\+506 8869 3999 [Website](http://www.amigostacosybeer.com/) [Menu](https://www.amigostacosybeer.com/menu)


**Brasilito**

* **Masala** **Indian restaurant**  – excellent Indian restaurant

* [**Doki Sushi**](https://drive.google.com/file/d/16e7VNB2OrzRLDLy9i4_lUk_9bouKxgVM/view?fbclid=IwAR05zc8s8Fjil90ckhlymp2BHQkQAKUulmDR7UriTNRHke_nY3SyVgr8obM) \- Excellent take out sushi (they deliver) \+506 6205-3348. Dinner only

**Huacas \- Plaza Paseo del Mar-  Shopping plaza**

[La Carnicería Gourmet](https://lacarniceriagourmet.com/contactenos) **\-** imported USDA Prime Meats & wines 

[Noily's](http://www.noilyswindowtreatment.com/) Window Treatment

Women’s boutique  selling beach wear, and jewelry for affordable prices

## [Casa Nova Furniture & Accessories](https://www.casanova.cr/)

# [Cafeseato Coffee Shop](https://www.facebook.com/Cafeseato/) \- great little spot of a salad or panini 

# Super Salon \-Nail salon 

# Nimbu Beauty Spa\-  10°22'44.0"N 85°47'09.1"W, Provincia de Guanacaste, Santa Cruz, 

# The Beach Chocolate Factory 🏭 

“El Cruce”  \- Major Intersection between Huacus & Brasilito where the roads 180-933-155 intersect) **Excellent Street Food**  

- **Geckos** Street Food Huacas \- Santa Cruz, Provincia de Guanacaste, Tempate, 50304  
  Sushi \- 2 Amazing Sushi trucks \- both owned by Chef \- Diego Santanrena \+506 8942-1717 [Menus](https://sites.google.com/view/kotoy-origami-foodtrucks/inicio) for both places: Origami ([Insta](https://www.instagram.com/origamistreetfood.cr/) \+ [FB](https://www.facebook.com/origamistreetfood.cr?mibextid=LQQJ4d)) \+ Kotoy ([Insta](https://www.instagram.com/kotoy.foodtruck/) \+ [FB](https://www.facebook.com/kotoy.foodtruck?mibextid=LQQJ4d)) [Menus](https://sites.google.com/view/kotoy-origami-foodtrucks/inicio) 


  
In this intersection there is also:   
Garden 🪴 Center   
Fruit 🍍 market   
Pharmacy 🏥   
Hardware store 🏬   
Adobe car 🚗 rental   
Kolbi mobile phone 📱 

**ACTIVITIES \- Off Site** 

**TENNIS/ PICKLEBALL**

* **Las Catalinas has new Tennis and Pickleball courts  (2024)** 

* **Mar Vista** \- clay courts (*these courts are under construction as of Jan 2024\)*    
  Steff \+506 8759-1881 does tennis clinics on Tuesday & Thursdays from 7:30-9:30 at Flamingo for now until the new place opens \- [https://alexsteff.setmore.com/](https://alexsteff.setmore.com/)

* [**Tamarindo Tennis club**](https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=10.30214473347%2C-85.838472140126&fbclid=IwAR1x0fvbQ76n-xWhMxV6sCH21fAXAfmsijjA2IhFj7muByRFQc8BWJFJ-BY) WhatsApp 8710-0508 or [\+506 7075 9002](https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=50670759002&fbclid=IwAR09Fptq1ncB0ac1UB15MupfvBkhmgzOfOv76T9xrAgFQd8hD-7BIxx4HBc)

*2 hard courts in the shade most of the day. Open to the public by appt. Cardio tennis and social double's once a week. Oliver, the owner & head coach speaks several languages & coaches all levels with equal enthusiasm. You can borrow a racquet, but bring sneakers. Olly is a world class guy and a world class player \- if you like tennis go and have a lesson you won't regret it as he will improve your game and you will enjoy it for sure.*

* **Playa Coco** . Tuesdays and Thursdays 7-9 am $10  
* **Flamingo** \- Margaritavilla tennis courts   
* **Hacienda Pinilla**\- Hard courts (Pickleball Clinic  8-10 am Saturdays   $10)

**Excursions: LOTS** of excursions detailed on the Las Catalinas [website](https://www.lascatalinascr.com/things-to-do%20).  

* [**\*Javier Vargas**](https://www.tripadvisor.com/ShowUserReviews-g309244-d3840128-r808923257-Costa_Rica_EZ_Travel_Adventures-Playa_Flamingo_Province_of_Guanacaste.html) ❤🇨🇷🤠 \+00-506-8837-1531 \- Tour Guide & Driver [LovingCostaRica.com](http://LovingCostaRica.com)

* **Horseback riding**: **Pacific Horses** Private tours pacifichorses.as.me Enjoyed an hour ride on the beach in Brasilito and with a guide named Nicole. Wear long pants & bug spray\! You will be dirty. @50$/hr. per person.

**Boating**:  There are numerous options to spend time on the waters around Las Catalinas. All the options are fun; prices vary based on size of the boats, \# of people on the boat, time of day and the duration of the trip. Definitely try to book a sunset cruise some time during your trip. It’s a special experience to watch the sun sink below the horizon on the water. A half day is from 8 AM – 12 PM or 2 to 6 PM (sunset). A full day is 8 AM – 4 PM or 10 AM to 6 PM (sunset).

***Las Catalinas \- \*If you don’t have enough people to rent the entire boat, LC can also arrange a ½ day sail with other LC guests \- walk over to Concierge and arrange with them directly***

* **“[Get My Boat](https://www.getmyboat.com/boat-rental/Costa-Rica/)” Boat Rental Broker**\- Range is \~$75/person to $300/hour **\-** Referred from someone local \- Look at the link \- find the type of boat you want \- They do a good job setting you up with a local provider at affordable prices. They will meet you at the beach Need Cash to Pay **\+506-8597-8323** ([Review for Rentals in Coco](https://mytanfeet.com/activities/boating-in-playas-del-coco-mystic-rides/))  This may be the same number of \*Marcy from [Mystic Rides](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Attraction_Review-g675687-d14215184-Reviews-Mystic_Rides-Playa_Ocotal_Province_of_Guanacaste.html) \- He is a Captain who owns a boat & offers boating tours (Can pick you up from your hotel)

* Playa Hermosa Boat Tour \- after go to [La Casita Del Marisco](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100063523544975) \- Seafood Restaurant right on Playa Hermosa beach \+506 4706 1086

* Euphoria \- 45 foot, 2023 Fontaine Pajot Luxury Sailing Catamaran. Available for half day / full day / over night charters [https://aqua29.pixieset.com/euphoria-1](https://aqua29.pixieset.com/euphoria-1/) Contact for enquires: Roberta Odio \+506 8843 0015\. Per Demian: *It’s an incredible cat, newest in the country \- highly recommend it (This company is owned by Homeowner Ofer Ketter & has lived in CR for over 20 yrs. He owns a travel agency in Costa Rica  WhatsApp is \+506-8442-0637, [www.origenescapes.com](http://www.origenescapes.com), [dream@origenescapes.com](mailto:dream@origenescapes.com)*

* \*[**Costa Rica Sailing Center**](https://ticotimes.net/travel/costa-rica-sailing-center-potrero-may-worlds-chillest-yacht-club) \- Potrero- This is only 15 min away and they will do sailing trips for small groups. Boat rentals, boogie boards, paddle boards, snorkel gear & kayaks or hire guides. [\+506 8473 7761](https://www.google.com/search?q=15%20M%20Sur%20de%20Hotel%20Bahia%20del%20Sol%2C%20Provincia%20de%20Guanacaste%2C%20Surfside%2C%2050309&oq=15+M+Sur+de+Hotel+Bahia+del+Sol%2C+Provincia+de+Guanacaste%2C+Surfside%2C+50309&aqs=chrome..69i57.982j0j7&sourceid=chrome&ie=UTF-8&tbs=lf:1,lf_ui:9&tbm=lcl&rflfq=1&num=10&rldimm=16007356624034644877&&phdesc=FRLKr2yrpRg&ved=2ahUKEwidvr6i_obzAhU6TDABHRQSBc4QvS56BAgJEDk&rlst=f#) Amazing views. (15 M Sur de Hotel Bahia del Sol, Provincia de Guanacaste, Surfside, 50309\. \**Hemingway’s Restaurant next door* 

* **Lazy** **Lizard**.  Big catamaran.  Fun, but can be crowded…something like $85 per person for afternoon sunset cruise.

* [**Serendipity**](http://www.sailingcostarica.com%20) seems like the best “classy” option. Perfect for 6 people. It’s a 50” Yacht, not a catamaran. $990 for ½ day sunset cruise. Pick up Flamingo marina. [Geneva](mailto:Serendipitycharters@gmail.com) handles bookings or Brad 506 8699 5260 

* [**Panache Sailing**](https://www.panachesailing.com/costa-rica-catamaran-sailing-tours/) 506 8495-0039. Sunset catamaran cruise $85 per person or rent the whole boat for $1700. Drinks, snacks, snorkeling equipment included 

* [**Pacific** Soul](https://pacificsoulsailing.com/) \- sunset trips (Mark \+506 8861 5676\)

* [**Mantaray Sailing**](https://www.mantaraysailing.com/) Owner: Luca Sabatini \+506 8525-0942. Endless drinks/a delicious lunch consisting of fish and vegetable wraps and a gorgeous fresh fruit platter. Let them know of any food allergies ahead of time. You can drive to the marina to catch or pay $10 cash per person to and from LC in a van. WApp Luca with the date \#of passengers  
  Matteo (+506-8320-5317 [matteo@mantaraysailing.com](mailto:matteo@mantaraysailing.com) ) or Luca usually captains. 

In general for 8 people it’s about $150 pp. without tip.   
See website for different sailboat/pricing options.   
Minimum Price Varies For up to 10 Passengers  
Morning Tour (8AM – 12PM) $1,500   
Sunset Tour  (1PM – 6PM) $1,900   
Full Day  (11AM – 6PM) $3,000

Access to Pro Snorkel Equipment, Professional Fishing equipment, Stand up Paddle Boards, Lily Pad and Professional Stereo Speakers with Bluetooth radio. 

* [Sea Star](https://www.seastarcr.com/%20) \- This is Sara Bega’s (Las Catalinas Architect) husband’s business: Sport Fishing, Beach Hopping, Sunset Cruise, Surf Trip (Ask for Michael)

* [Pacific Soul](http://pacificsoulsailing.com%20) Set sail on your Luxury Adventure aboard our Private Catamaran. Each of our tours is fully customized to provide you & your group with an amazing trip touring our magnificent coastline. We have Daily charters with 4, 6, or 8-hour options. **We also have the most amazing overnight adventures that you'll ever find\!** 

* [**Almaco Tours**](https://almacodiving.com/our-boats/) (Per Rich Roe \- “*We just had a wonderful day on a private boat out of Coco with Almaco Tours. If you are interested, we highly recommend these guys, I’ve used them 4 times” & Brian “they are great”*.

* **Rolbin** **of Marea Alta Adventures** whatsapp \+11-506-8966-6640. Best out of Coco Beach.

* [**Acqualord**](https://www.tourguanacaste.com/en/activity/268584/aqualord-ultimate-ocean-ecotour) – awesome banana boat & catamaran-well priced \- out of Flamingo beach

**Fishing**: No license needed.

[WetAss Fishing](https://www.wetassfishing.com/) \- GREAT\! Profession & super knowledgeable staff \- Now in new Flamingo Marina 

[Fly Fishing tours](https://stonemountainoutdoors.com/pesca/) \- Central Valley (Neil met the owner of this shop) 

\*For fishing gear, the closest shop is La Bahia located in Brasilito, about 11kms away. There are bigger stores in Coco Beach, about 28kms to the Blue Wave Fishing Store.   
Walmart has some items too, but wouldn't rely on them (in comparison to a US Walmart). 

[Sea Star](https://www.seastarcr.com/) out of Coco but got on a boat at Flamingo.  Owner is Michael Picado. Used them 3 times. They will do pleasure rides with no fishing too\!\!\! 

[Bushwacker](https://www.bushwackercr.com/captain-skeet-warren/) \- Skeet Warren is great.  His boat is bigger than most (45 foot Bertram) and very comfortable.

**Kayak fishing** with [Walter Moreno](mailto:wmorenofishing@gmail.com).  506-6253-9846. Out of Las Brisas at Potrero (5 min from LC).

**Turtles \-** [Ostional Wildlife Refuge](https://costarica.org/beaches/guanacaste/ostional/) \- (located 2 hrs south of LC on the [Nicoya Peninsula](https://costarica.org/destinations/nicoya/)). Thousands of Olive Ridley Turtles lay their eggs & watch baby turtles hatch \- usually During the rainy season, Aug \- Dec but specifically October Arribada “arrival by sea”. Sunset, Early evening & dawn are Ideal. Rough road to get there but an incredible experience\! **Guide Suggestion** \- Jaimy, \+506 8958 8508 “The magic of Ostional” 

**Surfing lessons \-** most surfers head to Playa Grande-around 30 minutes away. Lessons available from Jules \+506 8354-2044. Very highly recommended. They also pick up @catalinas.

 

**Food Tour Adventures** 😋

[Award Winning Chocolates](https://www.catachocolate.com/) \- Jim Kanter “My friend has a company in Playas del Coco, Cata Chocolate, where they make award-winning chocolates”

\*[Rancho Avellanas](http://www.ranchoavellanas.farm/#aboutus-section) **Goat Farm** *(22 min SE of Tamarindo)*  
([Tico Times Review](https://ticotimes.net/2013/08/15/the-happy-goats-of-rancho-avellanas-dairy-farm)) ([Insta](https://www.instagram.com/ranchoavellanas/?hl=en))

**Day Trips**: 

Chocolate, Coffee & Cheese Tours  
[Rancho Avellanas](https://www.ranchoavellanas.farm/) \- small family goat farm \- near Tamarindo \- Free to go but must make an apt for tour & to pet animals 

Blogs \- [**Things to do in Costa Rica**](https://mytanfeet.com/activities/50-activities-things-to-do-in-costa-rica/) & [Epic 1 Month Costa Rica Road Trip Itinerary](https://mytanfeet.com/costa-rica-travel-tips/costa-rica-road-trip-itinerary/) (My Tan Feet), [Nine Day Costa Rica Itinerary with Shelby](https://www.hannahspelledbackwards.com/home/2021/1/19/costaricawithshelby)

**\*Diamante Eco Adventure Park, (**30 min from LC) **\-** 350 east RIU Hotel, Playa Matapalo, Provincia de Guanacaste, Playa Matapalo, 50503, Costa Rica (Zipline rides over a forest canopy, plus tours of a butterfly house & wildlife center with jaguars)

**Tamarindo** is a “large” beach town about 45 minutes from LC. It has a large hotel (Hotel Dira), hostels, several small restaurants, art galleries & a lot of little shops. It’s probably the most touristy town in the region & a bit seedy.

It is known for surfing & is a great place to rent a board if you want to try surfing. (Rent boards at Witches Rock). It’s easy to hire an instructor for a quick lesson. Then, grab lunch at Witches Rock restaurant. (Try the BigAss Nachos, Falafel Bar, Green Papaya or Bodega).

* [Tenoria Volcano National Park](https://costa-rica-guide.com/nature/national-parks/tenorio-volcano/) About 2.5 hours north of Las Cat. Contains the stunningly beautiful Rio Celeste. Easy drive. LC offers a one day excursion, but you can book it yourself & stay overnight at the [https://www.riocelestehideaway.com/](https://www.riocelestehideaway.com/). It can be 20 degrees cooler than LC & can rain up there even in dry season. Wonderful hotels nearby, more like ecolodges \-Hideaway and Carolina Lodge

* [Cala Luna Resort](https://calaluna.com/) \- 1 hr \- [World’s Largest Labyrinth In Costa Rica](https://calaluna.com/costa-rican-adventure/worlds-largest-labyrinth-costa-rica/) 

* [Sibou Costa Rica](https://www.tripadvisor.co.nz/ShowUserReviews-g309253-d23291062-r786665387-Sibou_Restaurante-Tamarindo_Province_of_Guanacaste.html) (42 min S)- Stunning Spa & Restaurant with a beautiful ambience off the beaten path gem in the forest outside Tamarindo. Sexy and Sophisticated, feels like the South of France. 

* [Hacienda Guachipelin](https://www.guachipelin.com) 1.5 hrs (close to Rincon de la Vieja) Fun day trip \- Zip Line, tubing, hiking, horses, waterfalls, mud baths, hot springs, wellness etc  Ask to include the oropéndula (hanging bridge to waterfall).

* **\*LA LEONA waterfal**l (1.5 hr NE)  ([review](https://mytanfeet.com/activities/catarata-la-leona-curubande/))  AWESOME Adventure\! An easy 90 minutes away just north of Liberia.  **Nervin** \+506-8734-7296 (Ref by Kerry Alers) is a Great Guide\! (Rich & Diana also used [Colorado Adventure tours](https://coloradoadventurecr.com/tours.html#reservation)) The tour lasts 2.5 hrs & includes Private entrance, Hike guide, Bottled water, Safety equip lunch, liability policy, $ 25 p/ p (Check prices \- [this site](https://www.nativeswaycostarica.com/tour-item/la-leona-waterfall-tour/) provides more info) Rich “my new fav. As always, a full day trip” Review [here](https://www.goingpuravida.com/la-fortuna-waterfall.html)

* [Ostional](https://mytanfeet.com/costa-rica-national-park/ostional-wildlife-refuge-protecting-turtles/)  (2 hr S) \- **Turtle nesting on Ostional Beach** occurs year-round but hits a peak in the rainy season (September – December) (Hundreds of thousands of **olive ridley sea turtles** come to shore to lay their eggs). Night tours are available

**Weekend Getaways \- Overnight travels:**

* **Monteverdi** – (3 hr SE from LC) wonderful 10,500 hectares of cloud forest (7K visitors/yr). National Geographic has described it as “***the jewel in the crown of cloud forests*** (different from Rain Forest in terms of weather, plants, insects, & animals). Definitely opt for a guided hike to appreciate the biodiversity & views (hanging bridges) which are breathtaking. More difficult to get to than Arenal but well worth a visit esp if you have a car.

**Activities:** Hiking, Bird watching, night ecosystem tours (pack rain & warmer clothing)

**Monteverdi** **Restaurants:**

- [Tramonti](https://www.tramonticr.com/php_ing/menu.php)  \- Italian [Beautiful view and delicious flavors](https://www.tripadvisor.com/ShowUserReviews-g951347-d796972-r798386117-Tramonti-Monteverde_Province_of_Puntarenas.html)  
- [Monteverde Brewing company](https://en.monteverdebrewingco.com/)   
- [Orchid Coffee](http://orchidcoffeecr.com/)   
- [Stellas](https://stellasmonteverde.com/menu/) \- Breakfast

**Monteverdi** **Hotels:**  
[**Hotel** Monteverde Garden](https://www.monteverdelodge.com/)   
**Hotel** [El Establo Mountain Hotel](https://elestablo.com/)  
**Hotel** [Belmar](http://www.hotelbelmar.net/) Located in Monteverde’s cloud forest. 5 levels of [sustainability](http://www.hotelbelmar.net/certificate-sustainable-tourism/) award. 

- **Belmar Restaurants:**  
- **Celajes** \- Farm to table dining with balcony overlooking the Pacific Ocean   
- **Celajes Lounge** (opens at 10am) **Tico Time** (happy hr) (Every day 4pm- 5:30) assortment of “bocas” (the Tico word for tapas), complimentary with house cocktails or our craft beer, as well as specials on house beer & wine.  
- **Farm to Table** \- Complimentary daily tours \- The majority of produce from our organic garden & family farm (called Madre Tierra) is used in [our restaurant](http://www.hotelbelmar.net/restaurante-celajes-sep/)   
- **Cervezas Artesanales-** Enjoy delicious craft beers, a selection of wines, natural drinks and artisanal sausages at La Cerveceria. Join us every Friday, Saturday and Sunday from 1PM to 9PM. Our brewery has become an integral part of [our thriving restaurant](http://www.hotelbelmar.net/restaurant-monteverde-celajes/), drawing beer lovers from across the country. 

**Arenal** **Area**\- 3+ hours East – ***Arenal is the adventure capital of Costa Rica***\-  
**Must visit destination**. *Many wonderful hotels & activities.*  
(Arenal Volcano National Park, Talamanca Mountain Range, Forest Canopy by Aerial Tram or Zipline, Venado Caves-underground wonder-world of limestone channels, a day tour to Cano Negro National Wildlife, Natural Hot Springs, Lake Arenal, La Fortuna Waterfall.

**Rio Perdido**   
[Rio Perdido](https://www.rioperdido.com/) 5 stars \- 1,200 reviews (2+ hr East of LC) (60 minutes southeast of LIR airport) RR

🗺️ Base of the Miravalles Volcano \- San Bernardo de Bagaces, 50401  📞 011 506 2673 3600 

**Hotel:** [Rio Celeste Hideaway Hotel](https://www.riocelestehideaway.com/) 5 Star (2.5 hrs East of LC) (This opulent ecolodge, tucked into pristine dry forest at the foot of the Miravalles Volcano, offers soothing dips in natural hot springs, top-notch mountain biking trails and a palatial restaurant) Beautiful Chic, Ecologically-conscious, Small resort with bungalow rooms surrounded by tropical gardens. 

Adjacent to [**Tenorio Volcano National Park**](https://costa-rica-guide.com/nature/national-parks/tenorio-volcano/), where the amazing Rio Celeste gets its sky-blue color.(1 hr hr drive East to Arenal Volcano)  🗺️ Base of the Miravalles Volcano   
San Bernardo de Bagaces, Bagaces 50401   📞 011 506 2673 3600 

**Guided Tour \- Light Blue River Private Tour with [Javier](https://www.tripadvisor.com/ShowUserReviews-g309244-d3840128-r808923257-Costa_Rica_EZ_Travel_Adventures-Playa_Flamingo_Province_of_Guanacaste.html)** \- *Can arrange a combo trip such as: Butterfly Garden visit, Guided Tour on a Sloth Sanctuary, Nature Hike to Light Blue Waterfall at Tenorio Volcano National Park, Swim ave prices $100/adult $60/Kids Pick up EARLY- 4:30 or 5:30AM\!*

The centerpiece of the 600-acre private reserve is a unique THERMAL RIVER that runs for over a mile along the base of a rocky gorge. Access the hot river by descending stone stairwells & trails. Many untouched river pools to swim in. The ARCHITECTURALLY AWARDED restaurant has sweeping terraces with views of the canyons, volcanoes & Miravalles dwarf forest. There is a full-service spa, a bar/lounge, and 3 hot mineral pools with floating sun decks and wet bar. There are 15 miles of hiking and biking trails. Complimentary breakfast, wifi & parking. 24 hr concierge services, tour/ticket assistance. (Diana “The hotel is very nice, great food, a really cool thermal river, hiking, spa & other activities- zip lining & white water rafting” “We love it Nancy”). 

These 4 hotels are about 1.5 hrs south of Rio Celeste Hideaway

- **Hotel**: [The Springs Resort & Spa](https://www.thespringscostarica.com/) (3.5 hr from LC) (US \# 954-727-3939) [**CNN Travel**](http://edition.cnn.com/2011/TRAVEL/08/04/hotels.spectacular.views/index.html) voted our 5-star property 1 of 7 most spectacular views in the world. Sprawling [hot-springs resort](https://www.fodors.com/world/mexico-and-central-america/costa-rica/arenal-monteverde-and-the-northern-lowlands/hotels/reviews/the-springs-resort-spa-577761) in Arenal, is the [crème de la crème of luxury lodging](https://www.telegraph.co.uk/travel/destinations/central-america/costa-rica/hotels/the-springs-resort-and-spa-at-arenal-hotel/) in CR. 165-acre property, water slide, signature putt-putt, kids’ game room & our on-site [Club Rio Adventure Center](https://www.thespringscostarica.com/club-rio/), offering river tubing, kayaking, horseback riding, rock climbing, hot springs & amazing Animal Sanctuary.

- **Hotel:** [Nayara Gardens](https://nayaragardens.com/) (5 star) Luxury boutique hotel, widely recognized for providing premium luxury amenities, beautiful grounds & ultra-personalized service at surprisingly affordable rates.  🗺️ 702 road 21007, Provincia de Alajuela, La Fortuna, Costa Rica

(The Springs Resort has more to do on site, but both have beautiful grounds).

- **Hotel:** [Tabacon Thermal Resort & Spa](https://www.tabacon.com/?utm_source=TripAdvisor&utm_medium=ad&utm_term=Website&utm_content=Website&utm_campaign=TripAdvisor)  ([FrogTV 📺](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AnfhBPbW5aY)) ([TripAdvisor](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Hotel_Review-g309226-d293017-Reviews-Tabacon_Thermal_Resort_Spa-La_Fortuna_de_San_Carlos_Arenal_Volcano_National_Park_Provin.html)) world- class cuisine inspired by Dinner in the middle of the rainforest. Inside the gardens is The Spa, a beautiful location & open air bungalows all of them with private jacuzzi (*per Brooke Harris “Tabacon was our favourite\!”“We’re currently staying at Tabacon and LOVE it\! Restaurants, hot springs, and shuttles to activities.” & Doug Monett “Tabacon was our favourite\!”)*

- [BALDI Hot Springs Hotel & Spa](https://www.baldihotsprings.cr/) **\-** 25 Thermal Water Pools Amidst the tropical rainforest & Largest in the world


**Weekend Beach Getaways** 

* **Kintiri  \-** 2 hours from LC, near **Nosara**. It is 800 meters above sea level and is pure magic, relaxation and amazing food\!\! Staff is super humble and amazing\!\! (All locals). The gastronomy of this place fits right in with the region. Each dish is perfection and tells a story. It’s a couple’s retreat (no children) and dogs are welcome. Prepare for pure relaxation. A new gem in the south pacific of Costa rica\!\! **[https://www.kintiriglamping.com](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kintiriglamping.com%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR2kUp3Ld8PG13q77Yt-ocgcLV1fTuoIJmRDUjNfMRy7D6JvojNqMk0g6mU&h=AT0GlJmEudoWWcCwmHaPxeDoatnX52yfrWuhWvOTGj6SIpYC1l1sfcnuvBsgI3zLlHlLDAdpv-hstq-EmgO8I9WKyX76uZ2yKgaSwWsmhcixw1e6EoI12Jee3NOArIrfG1kGLGFiSw&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT3JM09u5_PiOpABWG7tPSmsNU68ipgcsvMOloLlPr4qDZvkH51u3y4m2Zr7ejAu2Jw5sTobqBYoya2sHNsOopRwKcrcTYY4bqpd7zCb4Zs5FGxaanHEJJTGjEfajILXw5WtLMkef8f65LHZfkY3Hx6HdOKS13dTV9Tw5gZF17fB0TU_oMurApRoaXCLFWmEVINQl5Cbh2ENiYE3iWs)**

* [**Nosara Beach**](https://maddysavenue.com/things-to-do-in-nosara/)**/Playa Guiones \-** 3 hours south \- a great beach town (known as one of the yoga capitals & 5 blue zones) Beaches free of developments, oxygen rich national parks, and the clearest ocean water in all of Costa Rica with great hotels. Small-town, peaceful charm with plenty of activities 

* **Hotels in the area**

[**Gilded Iguana**](https://www.thegildediguana.com/), [Nomadic](https://nomadicnosara.com/), [Lagarta Lodge](https://www.lagartalodge.com/en/home.html), [Bodhi Tree](https://bodhitreeyogaresort.com/) and [Harmony Hotel](https://harmonynosara.com/) (hotel owners are the [co-founders of BuzzFeed](https://www.cntraveler.com/stories/2016-01-28/how-buzzfeeds-co-founder-is-protecting-a-costa-rican-town), after a 7 day trip to ‘recalibrate their equilibrium’ spent surfing at sunrise & sunset, catching yoga classes before ceviche lunches & having epiphanic conversations about our lives, and return there every 6 months \- That’s what this place does to people” They had zero interest in becoming hoteliers but bought the run down hotel 15 yrs ago (“to make sure the property didn’t become a garish cartoon that ruined the integrity of Nosara.”) 

* **Restaurants** 

[The Guilded Iguana](https://www.thegildediguana.com/) (Hotel & Restaurant)   
Central location \- offering a large variety on their menu — this is a great spot to come after the beach and continue to relax at by their pool with a pina colada.  
*Per Lotus Ellis “Guided Iguana is great-middle of the action & has a surf club down the road that my kids love. Also like the Nosara Beach hotel \-amazing ocean view & owned by the same people as La Luna & Coyol (love both restaurants) . It's quiet & feels like you’re in Greece”.*

[La Luna](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g656474-d1722395-Reviews-La_Luna-Nosara_Province_of_Guanacaste.html) \- Beautiful Ocean side \- watch the sunset. Delicious pizza, seafood & Mediterranean cuisine.

[Coyol](https://coyol-restaurant.business.site/) (Hilltop restaurant with an [amazing view](https://www.instagram.com/coyolnosara/?hl=en)) Breathtaking panoramas in all Costa Rica. Mediterranean & Costa Rica fusion of Mediterranean well-renowned grilled food.

[Cafe de Paris](https://www.cafedeparis.net/)\- Delicious coffee, pastries & smoothies (healthy vegan/veggie options) 

[El Jardin](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g309235-d23209574-Reviews-Jardin_Tamarindo_Food_Truck_Park-Province_of_Guanacaste.html): Large food truck to walk in & sit down inside. Adorable outdoor seating area

[Rosi’s Soda Tico](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g656474-d2457116-Reviews-Rosi_s_Soda_Tica-Nosara_Province_of_Guanacaste.html)\- The best, home cooked local food (casado, fresh ceviche). Very affordable

[Seekret Spot Gelateria](https://www.tripadvisor.com/ShowUserReviews-g656474-d3784740-r214535838-Seekretspot-Nosara_Province_of_Guanacaste.html)\- the Best Gelato in Costa Rica\!

**Furniture**   
Scott of Scott Furniture in Huacas. Custom end tables, coffee tables & bar and kitchen stools  
Bruce \- [Brucescott.scott@hotmail.com](mailto:Brucescott.scott@hotmail.com). He is a lovely older gentleman from Boston who has lived in Costa for 30 years.He also delivers.

Warner Diez \- I found Warner through Demian. He does custom work. I am very pleased with the wood pieces he made for me.+506 8316 8083

Other shops include: [Casa Y Mas](https://casaymas.net/), [Mariloushop](https://www.mariloushop.com/collections/furniture), Casa Eulalia Cr, be.homecr,  [zara home](https://www.zarahome.com/cr/?utm_campaign=zh-ig&utm_content=LGN&utm_medium=Social&utm_source=all&utm_term=zh-ig), Artistica, [Bali Home Center](https://foursquare.com/v/bali-home-center/51213eb7e4b002b6f20a7250)

**Longer trips** 

# [**Santa Teresa**](https://www.twoweeksincostarica.com/santa-teresa/) **[Beach](https://nymag.com/strategist/article/santa-teresa-costa-rica-itinerary-things-to-do.html)** (4 hrs South- on the tip of Costa Rica’s Nicoya Peninsula)

**Puerto Viejo** de Talamanca (8 hr drive \- can stop  in Arenal for a night to break up the drive ) is a town in southeast Costa Rica, on the Caribbean coast.
